description: Solution-approach deliberation: before non-trivial implementation, generate 2-3 structurally different approaches, compare trade-offs, pick with a stated kill-trigger — plus a strategy catalog (tracer bullet, walking skeleton, spike, strangler fig, inversion, Polya) mapped to the risk each one beats, and an auto-nudged opinion round where four parallel blind opinion-lens subagents (Standards Purist, Quality-over-Speed, Pragmatist-Minimalist, Skeptic-Investigator) argue refactor-shaped tasks and synthesis converges to one pick in a single round. Includes /approaches:compare and /approaches:opinions.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)

interface.longDescription:
Solution-approach deliberation: before non-trivial implementation, generate 2-3 structurally different approaches, compare trade-offs, pick with a stated kill-trigger — plus a strategy catalog (tracer bullet, walking skeleton, spike, strangler fig, inversion, Polya) mapped to the risk each one beats, and an auto-nudged opinion round where three parallel blind opinion-lens subagents (Standards Purist, Quality-over-Speed, Skeptic-Investigator) argue refactor-shaped tasks and synthesis converges to one pick in a single round. Includes /approaches:compare and /approaches:opinions.

Codex fidelity: 4 faithful, 3 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).

name: approaches
